_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Verify health and status of mission infrastructure at frequency (IAW SOP).
reference_document_element_description: Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-006 (OP, cosine: 0.398), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.387).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.432). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [frequency, health, iaw, infrastructure, mission, sop] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.844 (P=0.841, R=0.847). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Verify health and status of mission infrastructure at frequency (IAW SOP)." and "Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance thresho" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.476 ≈ STS 0.432 (gap 0.044). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [frequency, health, iaw, infrastructure, mission, sop]. WIDAI terms: [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish].
